prompt: A clean, minimal, modern 2D rounded rectangle blank text button sprite for a mobile puzzle game. Perfect square format. Same rounded rectangle button shape and design as the play button, but completely blank with no icons, no text, and no symbols. Neutral white-to-light-gray color base (completely grayscaled/white so it can be tinted in Unity UI). Smooth polished surface with a subtle elegant drop shadow underneath. Clean flat vector style, centered composition. Transparent background.
